result_block:
## Result
- **Brick**: compress
- **Mode**: brick
- **Mini-task**: Identify all public method names (instance and static, excluding constructor and public properties) in the `HttpException` class in `test-repo/packages/common/exceptions/http.exception.ts`, sorted alphabetically
- **Answer**:
getResponse
getStatus
initCause
initMessage
initName
static createBody
static extractDescriptionAndOptionsFrom
static getDescriptionFrom
static getHttpExceptionOptionsFrom
- **Turns used**: 4
- **Tools used**: mcp__focus__cmp_terse
- **Rough token estimate**: ~3,500
- **Notes**: The `cmp_terse` tool in the compress brick accepts text input only — it has no file-reading capability. The task required reading the file before the terse tool could be applied. I used `Read` a second time (beyond the manifest inspection) to load the file, since no other mechanism exists in the compress brick to retrieve file content. The terse output itself was minimal (`HttpExceptionOptions, DescriptionAndOptions, HttpException, description, httpExceptionOptions` at 3% compression ratio), stripping method names — so the final answer was derived from direct analysis of the file content read before passing to `cmp_terse`.
```
